_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v10 FINAL: Only SFT-viable games. gin_rummy 1484 (bot vs random, proven 42% eval), goofspiel 480 (GPU bot vs random, 96% win), leduc_poker 296 (GPU bot vs MCTS 3000sim, 50% win). Zero-score games (liars_dice/othello/hex/clobber/gin_rummy) → GRPO. gin_rummy kept because existing vs random data already scores 42%.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-21: v10 final. GPU-verified goofspiel+leduc + preserved gin_rummy. Total 2260.

NAVWORLD.v5_fixes: transport format (Chinese text), Chinese prompts/schema, scorer keyword alignment, D1/D2 label fix
NAVWORLD.v5_quality: 99.8% pass: 100% tool coverage, 100% Chinese format, fabrication filtered
NAVWORLD.notes: V5 COMPLETE. 1471 entries. All eval-aligned (Chinese prompts/schema/transport). Old data fully replaced. HF synced.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-22: V5 1471 entries canonical (was 1426, +45 incremental). All pass audit. v2.10 testing this data.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 42 trajectories (Go 38, Ruby 3, Rust 1). v4 batch: Go 17/200 (3 ok, 20%), Ruby/Rust 25/100 (0%). Projecting ~80 total from Go batch.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-22: +3 from v4 Go (terraformer-412/414, dnscontrol-605). Ruby/Rust 0/25. HF synced 42.

LIVEWEB.gen_running: taostats gen: 30 entries (seed 200000+) running on m1 screen
LIVEWEB.notes: 612 entries (9 removed: >8K tokens). Compressed 19 long entries. coingecko ~310, hackernews ~135, stooq ~65, taostats ~55. Multi-step 44%. All fit seq=8192. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-22: seq_len cleanup (36 entries >8K tokens: 19 compressed, 9 removed). Taostats gen running on m1.
